Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0xA786 "REDARROWS-C000-A786" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$35 sta $01 jsr $c000 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Red Arrows.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added an init routine at $C000 which sets the device number of the current file ($BA) to $01 (tape) to circumvent a copy protection mechanism at $9405 (check fails if running from disk and causes the game to crash).
